message:
refactor(fcp-telemetry): improve export reliability and logging consistency

Enhances telemetry infrastructure with better error handling and
consistent logging patterns across all telemetry operations.

export.rs:
- Add retry logic for failed metric exports
- Improve batch export with chunking for large payloads
- Add export timing metrics

logging.rs:
- Standardize log format across all components
- Add structured context fields to all log entries

metrics.rs:
- Refine metric descriptions and labels
- Add histogram buckets for latency tracking

tracing_layer.rs:
- Improve span context propagation
- Add span timing with microsecond precision

lib.rs:
- Update public API exports

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
